framework.name: Velocity Vulnerability metric (Vv = v·TTL)
framework.description: Agent velocity is a first-class security parameter absent from human-centric IAM. At AWS Lambda scale (10K TPS) with 60s TTL, 6×10⁵ unauthorized ops execute before self-invalidation. Operation-count bounds (RCC) are velocity-independent — D ≤ n regardless of agent speed.
framework.raw_quote: a sixty-second revocation window permits on the order of 6×10³ unauthorized API calls at 100 ops/tick; at AWS Lambda scale, the figure approaches 6×10⁵

source.title: [PDF] Structural Equivalence Between Memory Consistency Models ... - arXiv
